works"],["p",{},["code",{},"AGDSTimePicker"]," wraps Reka UI''s ",["code",{},"ComboboxRoot"]," inside an ",["code",{},"AGDSField"],". Options are generated at mount time from the ",["code",{},"min"],", ",["code",{},"max"],", and ",["code",{},"interval"]," props. As the user types, options are filtered by matching the raw digit string, the ",["code",{},"HH:mm"]," value, or the display label. Selecting an item sets the ",["code",{},"v-model"]," to ",["code",{},"{ label, value }"]," where ",["code",{},"value"]," is the ",["code",{},"HH:mm"]," string. The dropdown is teleported to ",["code",{},"<body>"]," via ",["code",{},"ComboboxPortal"]," to avoid overflow clipping."],["h2",{"id":"props"},"Props"],["table",{},["thead",{},["tr",{},["th",{},"Prop"],["th",{},"Type"],["th",{},"Default"],["th",{},"Description"]]],["tbody",{},["tr",{},["td",{},["code",{},"label"]],["td",{},["code",{},"string"]],["td",{},"—"],["td",{},["strong",{},"Required."],"
